name: Ginger Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, then stir in the molasses.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and ground cloves) and stir into the molasses mixture.
4. Gradually add the hot water, beating until the batter is smooth.
5. Line a muffin pan with paper baking cups and fill each cup about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Test doneness by lightly touching the surface of a muffin; it should bounce back when touched.
